headline: Willis Towers Watson Uses INEOS Grenadiers Pact To Reframe Growth Story
summary: Willis Towers Watson and the INEOS Grenadiers Cycling Team have entered a multi year global partnership. The agreement brings Willis Towers Watson into front line sports sponsorship, with branding and collaborative initiatives tied to one of professional cycling's best known teams. The partnership is designed to increase global brand visibility and create new engagement opportunities with international clients and audiences. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:WTW, this move comes with the...
